name: Poly Property Group Co., Limited
summary: Poly Property Group Co., Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development, investment, and management activities in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company operates in four segments: Property Development, Property Investment and Management, Hotel Operations, and Other Operations. It is involved in the development of residential and commercial properties; and hotel and restaurant business, as well as provision of related services. The company also provides financial, management, asset management, property agency, and construction services. In addition, it manufactures and sells digital discs and others. The company was formerly known as Poly (Hong Kong) Investments Limited. Poly Property Group Co., Limited is based in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
